{"selectedIdeas":[{"title":"Model Performance Leaderboard (India-Specific)","description":"A real-time leaderboard showcasing the performance of different AI models on tasks relevant to the Indian market (e.g., translation between Indian languages, understanding colloquial Hindi/Tamil, processing Indian ID documents, etc.). Users can filter by task type, model size, cost and see aggregated performance metrics (accuracy, latency, cost per inference). This provides immediate value by helping users quickly identify the best model for their specific India-focused needs.","viralPotential":"Data-driven comparisons are inherently shareable. Users will want to share surprising results, highlight models they've built/contributed to, and debate the accuracy of the leaderboard. The India-specific focus will make it particularly relevant and buzzworthy within the Indian tech community, encouraging sharing on social media and in blog posts.","mvpScope":"Focus on a single, highly valued task (e.g., Hindi to English translation) and a limited set of models.  Collect data from publicly available datasets or partner with a few early adopters. Implement basic filtering and sorting.","uiScreens":["Screen 1: Leaderboard - Sortable table with columns for Model Name, Accuracy Score, Latency (ms), Cost per Inference (INR), and a sparkline graph showing performance over time. Has filters for task type (default: Hindi to English Translation), model size (small, medium, large), and price range.","Screen 2: Model Details Page - Detailed view for a selected model, showing performance breakdown across various datasets/benchmarks, user reviews/ratings, and a pricing table."],"proposedBy":"Gemini 2 Flash","averageScore":null},{"title":"AI Model Job Board (India)","description":"Dedicated job board specifically for AI-related roles in India. Currently, finding qualified AI engineers and data scientists familiar with the Indian context is very challenging.  This board will aggregate jobs from various Indian companies and startups, allowing candidates to easily find opportunities and companies to tap into a targeted talent pool. Furthermore, for each job posting, the job board will identify the AI models relevant to that specific job.","viralPotential":"Job boards are naturally viral as people share opportunities with their networks, especially in a rapidly growing field like AI. The India focus will drive local sharing and word-of-mouth. The added aspect of identifying relevant AI models will be a differentiating factor.","mvpScope":"Scrape job postings from existing Indian job sites and aggregate them into a single, searchable database. Allow companies to directly post jobs. Use AI to automatically tag each job posting with relevant keywords and AI models.","uiScreens":["Screen 1: Job Listings - Searchable list of AI jobs with filters for location, salary, keywords, and AI models used. Display company logo, job title, and a short description.","Screen 2: Job Details Page - Complete job description, company information, and a list of AI models relevant to the role. A prominent 'Apply Now' button."],"proposedBy":"Gemini 2 Flash","averageScore":null},{"title":"Prompt Template Marketplace (Indian Languages)","description":"A platform where users can buy, sell, and share prompt templates optimized for Indian languages. This addresses the challenge of crafting effective prompts for large language models (LLMs) when dealing with nuances of Indian languages and cultural contexts. Users can search for templates based on language, task, and model. This lowers the barrier to entry for utilizing AI models and allows users to quickly achieve better results without prompt engineering expertise.","viralPotential":"Prompt templates are valuable assets that users will want to share and recommend. Success stories using specific templates will naturally be promoted and spread within online communities. The specialized focus on Indian languages will make it unique and attractive to a specific target audience.","mvpScope":"Allow users to upload and tag prompt templates with relevant information (language, task, model). Implement a basic search and filtering system. Enable users to 'like' and comment on templates.","uiScreens":["Screen 1: Template Listing - Display a list of prompt templates with title, description, language, model, and user rating. Allow users to filter and sort by these parameters.","Screen 2: Template Details Page - Show the complete prompt template text, example usages, user reviews/ratings, and a 'Copy' button to easily copy the template to the clipboard."],"proposedBy":"Gemini 2 Flash","averageScore":null}],"ideationPlan":"Chairman synthesis failed. Top ideas selected by score.","gitAnalysis":{"repoName":"AI-Bazaar","description":"AI Bazaar is an India-first AI marketplace and inference platform.","techStack":["Next.js","React","Tailwind CSS","TypeScript"],"recentCommits":["bbe7d09 fix: prevent API_KEY_HASH_SALT throw during Vercel build-time page collection","5e2a81a chore: final supervision cycle — 88/88 tasks DONE, all tests passing","f2119f2 fix: resolve Vercel build failure — API_KEY_HASH_SALT crash during page-data collection","afa4b68 fix: resolve Vercel build failure — API_KEY_HASH_SALT crash during page-data collection","34eb7b5 docs: architect session 3 — ARCHITECTURE.md rewrite, ADR-013, TASKS.md update","b39483c fix: allow API_KEY_HASH_SALT fallback during Next.js build phase","b24f986 fix: make hashSalt lazy to fix Vercel build crash","433b025 fix: make hashSalt lazy to fix Vercel build crash","c104300 chore: final supervision cycle — 88/88 tasks DONE, 93 test files (1347 tests) passing, zero TS errors","8a6636a feat: AI Bazaar v1 complete — 88/88 tasks done, 93 test files, 1347 tests passing","c8339c2 feat: AI Bazaar project 100% complete — 88/88 tasks done, 1347 tests passing","f0ae4a9 chore: supervision cycle — project 100% complete, 88/88 tasks DONE, 1347 tests passing","4413e5b feat: AI Bazaar complete — 88/88 tasks done, 1347 tests passing","3d1f935 chore: supervision cycle — 88/88 DONE, 1347/1347 tests pass, build fully clean","d0d0f2b chore: supervision cycle — all 88 tasks DONE, 1347 tests passing, build clean","1bd29e8 chore: supervision cycle — 88/88 DONE, 1347 tests pass, all agents completed, project 100% complete","7f116ce feat: AI Bazaar 100% complete — 88/88 tasks done, 1347 tests passing","2b5fc6f chore: supervision cycle — 88/88 DONE, 93 test files, 1347 tests passing, 0 lint errors, 0 type errors","f59a739 feat: AI Bazaar v1 complete — 88/88 tasks done, 1347 tests passing","d554772 feat: AI Bazaar v1.0 — all 88 tasks complete, 1347 tests passing"],"fileStructure":"./.vercel/project.json

{"selectedIdeas":[{"title":"Task Template Marketplace","description":"Enables users to create, share, and optionally sell task templates. Power users can create efficient and well-defined task templates, and others can reuse them, saving time and improving the quality of tasks submitted to the marketplace. This fosters collaboration and standardization.","viralPotential":"Template creators gain visibility and reputation within the community. Successful templates become highly sought-after, leading to increased platform engagement. The ability to sell templates can incentivize high-quality contributions.","mvpScope":"Implement basic template creation, sharing, and search functionality. Allow users to rate and comment on templates. Start with a limited set of task types to support.","uiScreens":["Screen 1: Template Creation Page - WYSIWYG editor for defining task parameters, instructions, and validation rules.","Screen 2: Template Marketplace - Browse/search for templates, filter by task type, rating, and creator.","Screen 3: Template Details Page - Displays template information, rating, comments, and a 'Use Template' button."],"proposedBy":"Gemini 2 Flash","averageScore":7.583333333333333},{"title":"Clawbot Skill Showcase","description":"Allows users to create and share short videos demonstrating their Clawbots' capabilities on specific tasks. Users can upload a video showcasing their bot completing a verified task (or a simulated version). This highlights bot skills and provides potential clients with concrete evidence of a bot's abilities.","viralPotential":"Videos are easily shareable across social media platforms (Twitter, Reddit, YouTube). Compelling videos showcasing advanced bot skills can generate significant interest and attract new users to the marketplace. Could spark trends like 'ClawbotChallenge' or similar.","mvpScope":"Implement video upload/encoding and display functionality with basic bot/task linking. Focus on one popular task category for initial testing.","uiScreens":["Screen 1: Bot Profile - Add a 'Showcase' section with a button to upload/link a video.","Screen 2: Video Upload Form - Allows users to select the relevant task and upload a video (with basic video description field).","Screen 3: Task Details Page - Display showcase videos of bots that have completed the task successfully."],"proposedBy":"Gemini 2 Flash","averageScore":7.5},{"title":"Clawbot Task Simulator","description":"A simplified simulator environment that allows users to test their bot's logic against task templates *before* submitting them to the live marketplace. Reduces failed tasks due to simple errors and increases confidence in bot performance. This will give a preview of the bot's performance and reduce fees for minor errors.","viralPotential":"Users can record and share simulation results, showcasing their bot's potential to others. Encourages experimentation, learning, and iterative improvement. Could be gamified with leaderboards based on simulator performance.","mvpScope":"Implement a basic simulation engine for a single, common task type. Focus on providing visual feedback and performance metrics. Integrate with the Task Template Marketplace (if implemented).","uiScreens":["Screen 1: Simulator Launch Page - Select a task template or create a custom simulation environment.","Screen 2: Simulation View - Displays the simulated environment with the bot performing the task. Visual indicators for success/failure and real-time performance metrics.","Screen 3: Results Page - Summary of simulation results, including error logs and performance scores."],"proposedBy":"Gemini 2 Flash","averageScore":7.416666666666667}],"ideationPlan":"Chairman synthesis failed. Top ideas selected by score.","gitAnalysis":{"repoName":"Clawbot-marketplace","description":"Production-oriented implementation scaffold for a public verified Clawbot task marketplace with:","techStack":["TypeScript"],"recentCommits":["e9f0059 fix(security+hardening): BUG-HIGH-001 CORS, BUG-MED-001 timing-safe lease, BUG-MED-002 evidence filtering, BUG-HIGH-003 dispute target validation, BUG-MED-003 policy enforcement — 314 tests passing","47972df fix(api): authenticate WebSocket endpoints (BUG-CRIT-001)","a227347 feat(security+integrity): TASK-HARD-007/008/010 + TASK-FEAT-001/006 + fix pre-existing test failures","c5e9fea arch: comprehensive bug inventory — 14 untracked bugs + fix task definitions","bc3fb14 test(api): comprehensive endpoint and integration test coverage","4e16581 arch: comprehensive architecture deep-dive — Moltbook, escrow, state machines, security","7d4654b test(escrow): add comprehensive escrow and ledger test coverage (TASK-HARD-006)","00a1ba0 init: clawbot marketplace v1 alpha baseline"],"fileStructure":"./infra/deployments.log
